'''''9575''''' was a [[mining vessel]] that was piloted by "[[Pinky]]." He landed it on [[Horn Station]] after he needed a new [[Stabilizer/Legends|stabilizer]].

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|2|Incident at Horn Station}}
